# Kaldon — AI-Powered eCommerce Intelligence Platform

> Kaldon is an all-in-one AI platform that takes eCommerce sellers from product research to revenue. One platform replaces 6+ tools across product research, brand building, content creation, store deployment, and growth optimization.

## What Kaldon Does

Kaldon provides a 5-phase pipeline for eCommerce sellers:

1. **Discover** — AI-powered product research using 11 intelligence sources across Amazon, Walmart, and DTC marketplaces
2. **Build** — AI-generated brand identity including name, voice, visual system, logos, and brand guidelines
3. **Create** — Content calendar, social media posts, video studio, and landing pages — all on-brand
4. **Launch** — One-click store deployment with Stripe payments, blog engine, and marketplace listing generators
5. **Grow** — Ad campaign management, performance analytics, customer retention, and AI optimization

## Pricing

- **Free**: 2 analyses, no credit card required
- **Growth**: $119/mo (annual) — 5 analyses/mo, Brand Vault, Content Calendar
- **Pro**: $239/mo (annual) — 15 analyses/mo, Video Studio, Landing Pages
- **Scale**: $399/mo (annual) — 50 analyses/mo, Store Deployment, full pipeline
- **Enterprise**: Custom pricing
- **Single Analysis**: $39.99 one-time purchase

- Website: https://kaldon.io
